purpose: Freeze the first Samsung transfer-slice questions used to evaluate whether the Hanwha reference architecture can route to Samsung affiliate companies, select source-backed claims, and produce investor-facing answers without expanding the UI into a company selector.

paperUse.allowedClaim: Samsung demonstrates a first template-transfer test from the Hanwha reference architecture using DART financial claims plus official IR/DART narrative claims.
paperUse.notAllowedClaim: These scenarios do not prove full Samsung coverage, full five-group coverage, or commercial production readiness.
paperUse.expansionNote: SK, Hyundai Motor, and LG should receive equivalent scenario files after their identifier manifests, source inventories, source-backed claims, and affiliate-routing checks are created.

answerPolicy: Answer must be investor-facing Korean prose, not development-status prose.
Answer must not expose raw prompt text or private extraction text.
Answer must disclose when latest news or market data is not connected live.
Visible answer must not expose raw source-backed claim IDs.
Selected source-backed claim IDs must remain available in response.sourceClaims and exported trace JSON.
When a Samsung affiliate is named, representativeCompanyId must route to that affiliate even though the visible UI stays group-level.
runtimeAssumptions.claimMatchPolicy: expectedClaimIds are minimum required source-backed claims. Additional selected claims are allowed when the question overlaps another verified claim class.

scenarios.title: Samsung Electronics memory and HBM recovery
scenarios.question: 삼성전자 HBM과 메모리 실적 회복을 공식 자료 기준으로 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Samsung Electronics questions route to Samsung Electronics and select official IR plus DART financial claims.

scenarios.title: Samsung SDI loss narrowing and ESS pipeline
scenarios.question: 삼성SDI 적자 축소와 ESS 수주 확대를 투자 관점의 확인 변수로 정리해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Samsung SDI questions route to Samsung SDI and select SDI-specific battery and DART claims.

scenarios.title: Samsung C&T shareholder letter and portfolio direction
scenarios.question: 삼성물산 주주서한 기준으로 주주환원과 사업 방향을 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Samsung C&T questions route to Samsung C&T and select shareholder-letter and portfolio claims.

scenarios.title: Samsung Biologics orders and revenue guidance
scenarios.question: 삼성바이오로직스 수주와 매출 성장 가이던스를 공식 자료 기준으로 정리해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Samsung Biologics questions route to Samsung Biologics and select order/backlog, guidance, and DART claims.

scenarios.title: Samsung Life and Samsung Fire capital and dividend checks
scenarios.question: 삼성생명과 삼성화재의 자본·배당 확인 포인트를 DART 기준으로 정리해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether insurance questions select capital and dividend claims without inventing financial-company revenue definitions.

scenarios.title: Samsung Electronics and Samsung SDI financial comparison
scenarios.question: 삼성전자와 삼성SDI의 2024년 매출액과 영업이익 흐름을 비교해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether a cross-affiliate Samsung comparison preserves explicit company mentions, selects source-backed financial claims, and keeps the answer investor-facing without expanding beyond promoted claims.
